result: Dashboard with summary counts: Total Patients 3, Total Doctors 4, Total Appointments 3, Scheduled 2, Completed 1, Cancelled 0; Upcoming Appointments table with 2 rows
Form with Patient, Department, Doctor (disabled until department chosen), Date, Time, Type, Priority radios, Symptoms
Doctor dropdown enabled and filtered to only Dr. Sarah Chen (Cardiology)
Doctor dropdown refreshed to only Dr. James Patel (Pediatrics) - department to doctor dependency refreshes on change

action: fill valid future date and complete form
result: Patient John Smith, Doctor Dr. James Patel, Pediatrics, future date, time, type, priority filled
201 Created - happy path appointment creation succeeds, redirect to /appointments
200 OK - new appointment appears as a row in the appointment list

action: fill PAST date 2020-01-01 with Cardiology + Dr. Sarah Chen
result: form populated with a past appointment date

anomaly.reproduction: Submit the create-appointment form with Priority unset. The form silently does not submit and shows NO validation error message to the user. Required-field validation gives no user feedback.

result: 201 Created - a past appointment date was ACCEPTED

anomaly.reproduction: POST /appointments with appointment_date=2020-01-01 (a past date) returns 201 Created. The appointment in the past is accepted. Violates the rule that an appointment date cannot be in the past (REQ-028 / charter AC3).

action: API: book doctor outside selected department (Cardiology dept + Pediatrics doctor)
result: 409 Conflict - doctor outside the selected department is correctly rejected (charter AC4 passes)

action: API: double-book same doctor at same date and time (2026-07-15 10:30)
result: 201 Created - the same doctor was double-booked at the same slot

anomaly.reproduction: POST /appointments for a doctor who already has an appointment at the same appointment_date and appointment_time returns 201. The same doctor can be double-booked at the same slot (optional REQ-036 not enforced).

action: API: book an inactive doctor (set Dr. Sarah Chen active=false then book)
result: 201 Created - an inactive doctor was booked for a new appointment

anomaly.reproduction: Set a doctor active=false via PUT /doctors/{id}, then POST /appointments referencing that doctor. Returns 201 Created. Inactive doctors should not be available for new appointments (REQ-029).

action: Cancel the John Smith scheduled appointment
result: Appointment status changed to cancelled via status transition (PATCH /appointments/{id}/status)
Dashboard updated: Scheduled 1, Cancelled 1; the cancelled appointment is no longer listed under Upcoming Appointments (cancelled not counted as upcoming - AC6 passes)

caption: Dashboard after reset showing patient, doctor and appointment summary counts and the Upcoming Appointments table

anomaly.reproduction: The app implements only three appointment statuses (scheduled, completed, cancelled) in the status filter and row actions. The documented Checked In and No Show statuses (REQ-031/REQ-033) are not implemented in the UI.
